page.content: The electricity generation landscape in the Asia-Pacific region is undergoing significant transformation, driven by an increasing emphasis on renewable energy sources and distributed generation initiatives.

lines.text: The electricity generation landscape in the Asia-Pacific region is undergoing significant transformation, driven by an increasing
emphasis on renewable energy sources and distributed generation initiatives.

page.content: As reflected in the data, the electricity generation mix is increasingly shifting, with Coal comprising 30.5% of the total in 2020 and decreasing its share in subsequent years.

lines.text: As reflected in the data, the electricity generation mix is increasingly shifting, with Coal comprising 30.5% of the total in 2020
and decreasing its share in subsequent years.

page.content: Conversely, the contribution from Renewables has been on the rise, signaling a broader commitment to sustainable energy practices. The Power Purchase Agreement pricing metrics highlight the evolving market dynamics, with Average Prices reaching HKD200M in 2021 and Total Revenue escalating to HKD2100M in 2022.

lines.text: Conversely, the contribution from Renewables has been on the rise, signaling a broader commitment to sustainable energy
practices. The Power Purchase Agreement pricing metrics highlight the evolving market dynamics, with Average Prices
reaching HKD200M in 2021 and Total Revenue escalating to HKD2100M in 2022.

page.content: Furthermore, the distributed generation growth is noteworthy, with a Growth Rate of 40% indicating robust expansion in this sector. Natural Gas, while maintaining a significant share, represented 45.0% of the generation mix in 2020, with its contribution adjusting to 40.0% by 2022. The contracts signed in this period underscore the commitment to renewable energy, as evidenced by the substantial increase in units sold, which rose to 1800 million in 2022 from 750 million in 2021. These metrics collectively illustrate the ongoing transition towards a more diversified and sustainable energy portfolio in the region.
